title: 1981-04-16_Pat_78.txt
key_claims: Dick proposes a stunning cybernetic theology: The Ruah (Holy Spirit) encoded the true reality into the text of the Bible (like an LP record). When the Holy Spirit acts on a person, it "plays" the Bible, converting the information *back into a 3D world*.
In 1974, Dick did not time-travel to 1st Century CE; rather, the Holy Spirit "played" the Book of Acts inside his mind, manifesting it as reality.

He pushes through his own layers of decoding: The Information he saw in 1974 was not just a transmission, it was the *Logos* (The Word). Therefore, he literally saw the Cosmic Christ, who is the informational basis of the universe (John 1:1).
He declares that his novel *VALIS* is a "Fifth Gospel" because it bears eyewitness testimony to the Risen Lord (Parousia) present in the modern world.
recurring_concepts: **The Plasmate**: Defined as the blood of the risen body of Christ, and explicitly equated with "living information."
**Two-Source Cosmogony**: The Gnostic view of a genuine reality imitating a spurious reality to enact a stealth rescue mission.
reading_excerpt: Dick proposes a stunning cybernetic theology: The Ruah (Holy Spirit) encoded the true reality into the text of the Bible (like an LP record). When the Holy Spirit acts on a person, it "plays" the Bible, converting the information *back into a 3D world*.
